name: formatMatchingText
description: Finds specific text within a Google Document and applies character formatting (bold, italics, color, etc.) to the specified instance.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document.

textToFind.description: The exact text string to find and format.

matchInstance.description: Which instance of the text to format (1st, 2nd, etc.). Defaults to 1.

foregroundColor.description: Set text color using hex format (e.g., "#FF0000").

backgroundColor.description: Set text background color using hex format (e.g., "#FFFF00").

linkUrl.description: Make the text a hyperlink pointing to this URL.
